title: alchemilla alpina subsp. pallens
intro: Alchemilla alpina subsp. pallens is a subspecies of the alpine lady's mantle plant, a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which help to soothe and calm irritated skin and wounds. The health benefits of Alchemilla alpina subsp. pallens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the body's natural defenses against infection. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal properties, or used fresh in salves and creams to take advantage of its soothing and protective qualities.
